name: nearby-transfer
description: Encrypted nearby device file transfer app for desktop and Android.
author: Nearby Transfer Contributors

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/renderer.js && node --check src/core/config.js && node --check src/core/crypto.js && node --check src/core/discovery.js && node --check src/core/path-utils.js && node --check src/core/server.js && node --check src/core/transfer.js && node --check test/crypto-smoke.js && node --check test/local-transfer-smoke.js
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run dist:linux && npm run dist:windows
